types.name: TypeRef
types.docs: Reference to a builtin, named, or composite type.

fields.name: required
fields.docs: Whether the field is always present.

variants.name: enter-insert-before
variants.docs: Enter insert mode before the selection.

variants.name: enter-insert-after
variants.docs: Enter insert mode after the selection.

variants.name: redo
variants.docs: Redo the most recent undone edit.

variants.name: config-reset
variants.docs: Reset one config field to its default.

variants.name: editor-mode
variants.docs: Apply a typed editor mode change.

variants.name: editor-insert
variants.docs: Insert text at the current selection.

types.name: GlorpOutcome
types.docs: Revisioned outcome for a successful command.

fields.name: changed_config_paths
fields.docs: Config paths changed by the command.

fields.name: warnings
fields.docs: Warnings emitted while handling the operation.

variants.name: word-or-glyph
variants.docs: Prefer word boundaries, fall back to glyph boundaries.

variants.name: if-ready
variants.docs: Include scene state when already materialized.

operations.docs: Reset one config field to its default.
Apply a typed editor mode change.
Insert text at the current selection.
Return the current selection read model.
Return the current inspect read model.
Resolve and validate a live Glorp session.
Stop the live shared runtime for the resolved session.
Validate a config value without mutating runtime state.
Poll the next event for a subscription token.
